risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Implement strict assembly guidelines and use alignment tools.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may affect cooling inlet performance.

risk.mit: Reinforce the motor mount area with additional stiffeners.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to the equipment bay door during deployment.
risk.mit: Add protective padding around the door mechanism.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect the accuracy of the cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Conduct post-processing inspections and adjustments.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Evidence features: spar_socket, main_spar, anti_rotation_key, rib, carry_through, frame
Datum visibility: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled
Clearance named: Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances
Interface count: Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Standard fit vocabulary: Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance
Standard hardware dimensioning: Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes
Spar datum access: Spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable
Mission payload non-weapon boundary: Payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module
CG battery service: Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal
Load path continuity: Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer

verify.rule: Each required evidence feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.
Each part and feature in part_tree should have corresponding geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if preload not properly applied.
risk.mit: Include torque wrenches and preload specifications in documentation.

risk.desc: Possible thermal expansion issues affecting fit.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of damage during handling due to fragile components.
risk.mit: Add protective packaging and handling instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect part orientation during assembly.
risk.mit: Label all parts and provide clear assembly diagrams.
